name: Ask Sales V4 safe conditional-answer framing development check 2026-07-22
purpose: Development-only regression set for answering stable rules without silently assuming missing case prerequisites.

prompts.question: An author has a successful book and a website for it but no registered business. Can they qualify for America's Authors, and what still needs to be confirmed?

goldNeeds.text: State the conditional fit rule without assuming the author meets an unstated sales prerequisite.
goldContext: The author can qualify without a registered business if the book has a website and physical copies are selling.

prompts.question: Are reps ever allowed to mention price on Call 1, and exactly when would that exception apply?

goldNeeds.text: Explain the default prohibition and preserve every condition on the narrow disqualification exception.
